title: CMS Energy (CMS) Arm Gets Nod to Offer Coal-Free Electricity
text: CMS Energy's (CMS) subsidiary gets a regulatory nod for its updated Clean Energy Plan, under which it will provide 100% coal-free electricity to its customers by 2025.

title: 2 Big Ideas From BMO Capital Markets With Up to 45% Upside Potential
text: Last week saw equities markets bounce back with roughly a 6% gain. The past few months have put markets in bear market status and, despite this gain, investors are shopping around and bottom-fishing for any stock that could provide some upside.

title: Landmark Plan to Accelerate End of Coal Era, Provide Reliability and Protect Environment Earns Approval
text: JACKSON, Mich. , June 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- A key regulatory decision today cleared the way for Consumers Energy to stop burning coal to generate electricity by 2025 — 15 years faster than previously planned — and provide reliable electricity for Michigan.

title: Why Is CMS Energy (CMS) Up 2.9% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: CMS Energy (CMS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
